title: Buzzy Teeth
description: Hello, player! Welcome to Buzzy Teeth, a mod aimed at improving realism in Minecraft by adding consequences for eating golden foods with some possibilities to turn them at your own favor!
body:
**Hello, player! Welcome to Buzzy Teeth, a mod aimed at improving realism in Minecraft by adding consequences for eating golden foods with some possibilities to turn them at your own favor!**

Up from now, eating golden apples (both types) as well as golden carrots will make your teeth drop. It's not necessarily bad although, because your teeth can be very useful for these following things:

**Blocks**

- Block of Teeth: Crafted with 9 teeth and used for building and compact storage. Can be placed with different rotations, like the logs.

**Items**

- Tooth: As described above, obtained from eating golden apples and carrots. Used to craft blocks of teeth, dentures and also bone meal.
- Dentures: An aesthetically pleasing piece of armor that gives you 1 unit of armor when placed in the head slot. Dentures aren't breakable.
- Iron Dentures: These dentures negate the teeth dropping.
- Golden Dentures: These have an extra benefit of increasing your teeth yield by 50%.

**Other Changes**

- The player isn't the only one able to wear dentures. You'll also stumble upon zombies, zombie villagers and skeletons wearing those.

**Hope you enjoy! Let's show some power to those dentists! >:)**

<sub>MCreator link: https://mcreator.net/modification/100881/buzzy-teeth<sub>
